name: llama.cpp Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B (Vulkan/ROCm)
description: Dedicated embedding endpoint. Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B Q8_0 GGUF via llama.cpp on Strix Halo gfx1151, OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings on port 8004. Registers as crow-embed provider so KB MCP and any other consumer can request 1024-dim vectors without depending on grackle's Ollama.
